overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring an upscale weapon showroom called 'Centaurian Arsenal'. The character walks through a stylish interior with dark paneled walls, gold accents, and weapon displays, approaching a reception desk and back workstations.

agents.ego_description: walking from the entrance toward the seating area, observing the weapon displays and signage

notable_agents.action: small yellow service robot moving around the showroom floor near the displays

entered.detail: large illuminated gold signage reading 'CENTAURIAN ARSENAL' on the dark back wall
rectangular sign with 'COMBATECH' text below the main arsenal signage
glass display case containing various firearms and weapons
glass display case with weapons positioned near the seating area
two blue-gray couches with a small table between them against the left wall
large curved architectural wall with vertical gold accent strips

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the entrance of the Centaurian Arsenal showroom, with large gold signage and weapon display cases visible. A small yellow robot moves around the floor as the character walks toward a seating area with blue couches.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area with seating and displays

events.description: moving from the entrance signage area into the central lounge space

agents.ego_description: walking through the seating area, passing the couches and coffee table while heading deeper into the showroom

entered.detail: oval wooden coffee table with a few items on it between the couches
framed artwork depicting a sunset or abstract scene on the far wall
tall yellow and blue vases on a low shelf near the couches

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the lounge area, passing blue couches and a wooden coffee table. The main signage exits view as the character approaches a wall with framed art and decorative vases, while weapon displays remain visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception desk area with service counter

events.description: approaching the curved reception desk where a vendor is standing

agents.ego_description: walking toward the reception desk, observing the vendor behind the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the reception desk, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: large curved dark reception counter with multiple computer terminals on top
row of gray chairs lined against the right wall near the reception area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the reception desk where a vendor stands behind the counter. The seating area falls behind as the character moves into the service area, with waiting chairs visible along the right wall and weapon displays now to the left.

agents.ego_description: walking past the reception desk toward the back corner with computer equipment and workstations

notable_agents.action: vendor remaining at the reception desk in the background

entered.detail: desk with multiple monitors and electronic equipment against the back wall
blue and gray metal tool storage cabinets next to the workstation

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the reception desk into the back office area, approaching a computer workstation with tool cabinets. The reception desk and vendor recede into the background as the character explores the rear corner of the showroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the upscale Centaurian Arsenal showroom, transitioning from the grand entrance into the private back-office area. It begins at the entrance beneath large gold signage, passing weapon display cases and a small yellow robot as the camera moves toward a lounge with blue couches. As the character pushes further into the interior, the main signage fades from view and the scene shifts past framed art and decorative vases toward the service counter. The camera then glides past the reception desk and vendor, leaving the seating area behind while moving along a row of waiting chairs. Finally, the perspective pushes into the rear corner of the showroom, moving past the reception area to reach a computer workstation surrounded by tool cabinets.
